column1: # ZAP baseline allowlist — reviewed findings accepted as not actionable.
# Seed list; add real findings from the first CI run, each with a reason.

column3: Suspicious comments are minified vendor-bundle false positives
Informational: this is a single-page app (modern web app)
Cache-control: hashed static assets are cacheable; the SPA shell is small (informational)
HSTS is set by the TLS-terminating reverse proxy in deployment; the local-dev HTTPS server omits it to avoid pinning localhost to HTTPS for other local services
CSP style-src 'unsafe-inline' is required for the app inline styles; tightening tracked in TODO.md
Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy deliberately unset (no cross-origin isolation need; avoids breaking Spotify SDK iframe/resource loads)
